plan_metadata.name: Sample Stocks Update Notification Bot Local Debug

steps.description: Click the language selection button (globe icon with "EN" text) located in the lower-left corner of the Visual Studio Code welcome screen.
Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" workspace item in the Explorer panel within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "View Samples" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit sidebar.
Click on the search bar in the "Samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface to input or filter items.
Type text: 'stocks update' into the search bar at the top of the "Samples" page in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.

Click on the "Stocks Update" sample card in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface under the "Samples" tab. The card includes descriptions such as "Bot," "TS," "Azure Functions," and "API Key." The red crosshair points to the card's center.
Click the "Create" button in the "Stocks Update" sample section within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" field in the "Choose the folder where your project root folder will be located" dialog to select the project directory.
@assertion 'Preview README.MD' is visible
@assertion the page title contains 'Stocks Update Notification Bot'
Right-click on the "Preview README.md" tab in the Visual Studio Code application interface to interact with the preview pane displaying documentation for the Stocks Update Notification Bot project.
Click the "Close" option in the context menu within Visual Studio Code to close the currently open tab, specifically the "Preview README.md" tab.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
#!/bin/bash

# Define file path
file_path="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/stocks-update-notification-bot/env/.env.local"

# Verify file exists
if [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
    # Perform the replacement
    sed -i 's|TEAMSFX_API_ALPHAVANTAGE_ENDPOINT=|TEAMSFX_API_ALPHAVANTAGE_ENDPOINT=https://www.alphavantage.co|' "$file_path"
    echo "Replacement done successfully."
else
    echo "File does not exist: $file_path"
    exit 1
fi
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
Replacement done successfully.

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description: @code replace \"TEAMSFX_API_ALPHAVANTAGE_ENDPOINT=\" with \"TEAMSFX_API_ALPHAVANTAGE_ENDPOINT=\"https://www.alphavantage.co\"\" in file \\\"/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/stocks-update-notification-bot/env/.env.local\\\"\""

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
file_path="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/stocks-update-notification-bot/env/.env.local.user"

if [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  sed -i 's/TEAMSFX_API_ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY=/TEAMSFX_API_ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY=demo/g' "$file_path"
  echo "Replacement complete!"
else
  echo "Error: File does not exist at path: $file_path"
fi
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
Replacement complete!

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description: @code replace \"TEAMSFX_API_ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY=\" with \"TEAMSFX_API_ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY=\"demo\"\" in file \\\"/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/stocks-update-notification-bot/env/.env.local.user\\\"\""
Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.
Type the text "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" into the command palette search bar at the top-center of the Visual Studio Code interface, shown over the application's main content.
Press the "Enter" key to execute the selected command, "Debug: Select and Start Debugging," in Visual Studio Code's Command Palette.
Type text into the Visual Studio Code "Run and Debug" dropdown search bar: 'debug in Teams(chrome)'.
Press the "Enter" key to select the highlighted "Debug in Teams (Chrome)" option from the command palette within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click on the "Email, phone, or Skype" input field in the Microsoft account login interface.
Click the "Yes" button in the Microsoft login prompt to confirm staying signed in.
Click the "Add" button in the pop-up window for the TeamsConversationBot app on the Microsoft Teams interface.
Click the "Open" button in the "Added successfully!" dialog of the TeamsConversationBot interface within Microsoft Teams.
@assertion "stocks-update-notif-botlocal" exist
@assertion that "Microsoft Corporation" appears in the bot response and all data shown in the image is rendered correctly.
